Operation.xpath: /Defs/PawnKindDef[defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Archcount" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Marquess" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Archduke" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Magister" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Despot" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_HighStellarch" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Emperor" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Fighter_Absolver" or defName="VFEE_Empire_Royal_Techfriar"]/xenotypeSet
